name: Kolkata
industries: IT services in Salt Lake and New Town, banking and insurance headquarters, and eastern India's engineering and industrial firms anchor hiring.
intro: Kolkata's certification market is quieter than the southern metros, which is precisely why credentials carry weight here: with fewer certified professionals in circulation, a PMP or CSM stands out sharply to the IT parks in Salt Lake Sector V and New Town, the banks and insurers headquartered in the city, and the engineering and steel businesses that run eastern India's industrial projects. Many Kolkata professionals also certify while targeting roles in other metros or the Gulf, where the credential travels with them. Our weekend live online batch keeps it simple — two full days on Indian Standard Time, from home. Trainers work through mixed cases: legacy-modernisation programmes, PSU stakeholder management, distributed services delivery. Afterwards comes the full support layer: exam application help, realistic mock exams, and a direct line to the trainer for questions until you clear the exam.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Kolkata?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST in Kolkata. The full workshop is completed across one Sat–Sun weekend.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Kolkata?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Kolkata. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from India?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in India and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Kolkata sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in India accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.
